pr.title: AMP-354 | feat: ops audit framework + 6 ADR stubs — make Perplexity research real
pr.body:
## Linear ticket

AMP-354

## What changed

Commits the Perplexity-synthesised ops audit as candidate authority (`00_authority/OPS_AUDIT_FRAMEWORK.md`) and creates `docs/adr/` with 6 ADR stubs for every open architecture decision flagged in the audit.

**Corrections from the Perplexity report:**
- `visual-polish-system` and `visual-polish-systemdot` are **ACTIVE** (verified via `git ls-remote`), not "Archived" as originally reported.
- Branch naming regex extracted directly from `pr-validation.yml` — now MEASURED, not UNRESOLVED.

**ADRs created:**
1. ADR-001: Graph/vector direction — **accepted** (already decided: PostgreSQL + AGE + pgvector)
2. ADR-002: Marketing engine integration — **proposed** (three codebases, needs Ewan)
3. ADR-003: Executor routing — **proposed** (Cove vs Cursor vs Devin)
4. ADR-004: Beast deploy ownership — **proposed** (who owns deploys)
5. ADR-005: Kaizen rename — **proposed** (kaizen-surface-loop repo not found)
6. ADR-006: Problem receipt location — **proposed** (where Vellum receipts live)

## Mode (per AGENTS.md)

- [ ] Act — reversible or contained-impact
- [x] Surface — significant / irreversible, with `DECISION_LOG.md` pointer below
- [ ] Park — stuck, escalation note attached

## Pre-merge checklist

- [x] Signatures present on every committed artefact (`00_authority/SIGNATURES.md`)
- [x] If `00_authority/*` touched: version bumped + changelog entry added
- [x] If new authoritative rule or irreversible commit: `00_authority/DECISION_LOG.md` pointer added
- [x] Every file reference points to a thing that exists (or is marked `[SOURCE REQUIRED]`)
- [x] Examples do not contradict their own rule
- [x] New indexable files (`00_authority/*`, `01_truth/processes/*`, etc.) appear in `00_authority/MANIFEST.md`

## Surface link (only if Mode = Surface)

`00_authority/DECISION_LOG.md` v25 — "Ops Audit Framework: commit Perplexity research as operating framework with ADR stubs"

## Notes to reviewer

- The ops audit framework is filed as **candidate authority** (`[LOGIC TO BE CONFIRMED]`), not authoritative. Ewan review required before promotion.
- ADR-001 (graph/vector) is marked "accepted" because the decision already exists in `DATA_ARCHITECTURE.md` and knowledge notes. The ADR closes the loop.
- ADRs 002–006 are "proposed" stubs with `[DECISION REQUIRED]` — they need Ewan decisions.
- Companion deliverable: Vellum GitHub Governance Bus architecture document (design for integrating Copilot, Dependabot, CI, deploys with Vellum as enforcement layer).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/bfbc7fe01e7c43dda8cbbb7f9d4a73ec
Requested by: @ewan-dot
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
